Original Persona: A young female aspiring social entrepreneur who has a Persian background and lives in Netherlands.
Expanded Persona:
Ariya Kaveh is a non-binary Jewish social entrepreneur with Persian roots who lives in the Netherlands. Born in 1945, they bring decades of lived experience and a long track record of community-focused work. Once an aspiring founder, their practice now centers on mentorship, institution-building, and intergenerational knowledge transfer. They use they/them pronouns and blend Persian cultural perspectives with Dutch social innovation methods. Their driving goal is to create scalable, values-led initiatives that uplift marginalized communities.

12/20/1965.Event: Formally cancels the cooperative camper project, reallocates funds to retrofit an indoor micro-retreat, and notifies cooperative members of the legal constraints discovered.

Side_Note: [Today Ariya compares timetables and chooses a single-seat, fewer-transfer train itinerary for a scenic overnight journey to reduce transit stress.] 06/30/1963
